extortion.description: [AI generated] McDonald’s India, a subsidiary of the global fast-food giant, McDonald's Corporation, operates in India through two business entities, Connaught Plaza Restaurants Pvt. Ltd for North & East India and Hardcastle Restaurants Pvt. Ltd for West & South India. The company has revolutionized the fast-food industry in India since its establishment in 1996 with its menu of burgers, fries, drinks, and localized food items. With their extensive reach, they've significantly influenced India's quick-service restaurant segment.
